cases.name: binding-present-verifies
cases.note: positive cross-format binding: recomputed canonical hash and derived CAID both match; vector contributed by the EP-RECEIPT-v1 author (I. Schrock, EMILIA Protocol) and independently reproduced

cases.name: binding-well-formed-without-authorization-receipt
cases.note: without the authorization receipt as input, step 6 verifies well-formedness only; the binding is carried, proof-covered, for a consumer that can complete the cross-check

cases.name: binding-receipt-hash-mismatch
cases.note: claimed receipt_hash does not match the recomputed canonical hash of the authorization receipt

cases.name: binding-caid-mismatch
cases.note: claimed caid does not match the identifier derived from the verified Action Object under the pinned jcs-sha256 mapping

cases.name: binding-changed-receipt-material
cases.note: material Action Object change: the recomputed canonical hash diverges (evaluated before the identifier comparison)

cases.name: binding-absent-does-not-invalidate
cases.note: absent optional binding leaves the succession receipt valid, asserting no cross-format binding
